'''Michael Gallo''' is a video game developer who formerly worked for [[LucasArts]].

{{Bio-stub}}

==Works==
===Gameography===
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] – Production manager
*''[[Star Wars: Demolition]]'' – Production manager
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' – Manual writer
*''[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan]]'' – Producer
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' – Producer
*''[[Star Wars: Galaxies]]''  – Special thanks
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' – Producer
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' – Manual writer
*[[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'']] – Additional Design, Development and Management
